title: Creamy Fry Egyptian Lentils
description: An earthy and creamy meal-prep dish featuring fry lentils made with passata for a vegetarian-friendly option.
instructions: Rinse lentils and pick out any debris. Rinse again under cold water.
In a large pot, combine lentils with 4 cups of water and bring to boil. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer until tender, about 20 minutes.
Add olive oil, onion, garlic, and continue cooking over medium heat for about 5 minutes or until the onions are translucent.
Stir in crushed tomatoes and passata. Simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
Fold in parsley and lentils into the sauce, adjust seasoning with salt and pepper to taste. Cook for another minute.
Transfer lentil mixture to a baking dish. Bake uncovered for about 25-30 minutes or until golden brown on top.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
